name: Peanut Butter Meringue Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pre-baked pie shell and allow it to cool completely.
2. In a double boiler set over simmering water, combine 1/2 cup hot milk with sugar and flour. Cook for 20 minutes or until thickened.
3. Stir in an additional 1 1/2 cups of hot milk into the mixture. Cook for 2 more minutes.
4. Add vanilla to the custard mixture.
5. Beat peanut butter with remaining milk. Combine this with the custard.
6. Pour filling into pie shell.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, gradually add and beat in vanilla and cream of tartar.
9. Gradually add sugar, beating until very stiff and glossy. Ensure all sugar is dissolved.
10. Spread meringue over hot filling and seal it to the edge of the crust.
11. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown. Cool before serving.
